item.title: Unlucky Oscar Piastri robbed of victory as Kimi Antonelli benefits from safety car to win Japanese GP
item.description: The Aussie looked on track for a stunning win before an unrelated crash ruined his chances.

item.title: US-Iran war live updates: Victoria announces free public transport throughout April amid ongoing fuel crisis
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Max Verstappen already considering retiring as hated Formula 1 rules exposed
item.description: The four-time world champion is sick of it after just three races and knows ‘it’s a bit sad’ to be talking about quitting.

item.title: Adelaide 36ers coach Mike Wells blows up at referees’ treatment of Bryce Cotton in NBL title series
item.description: ‘I know it’s footy season, but that’s a different game right now. We’ve got to play basketball.’

item.title: Top baby names in Queensland reveal ‘floral’ trend in newborns
item.description: Parents were inspired by one sporting team for naming baby girls.

item.title: Dezi Freeman unlikely to have acted alone, expert says after fatal police shooting
item.description: ‘It would have been very hard to survive out there on his own.’

item.title: Oscar Piastri sends statement with ‘one of my best weekends in F1’ despite missing out on Japanese Grand Prix win
item.description: The Aussie showed everyone just what they’d been missing when he rocketed to the lead on his first official lap of the season.

item.title: US President Donald Trump allows Russian oil tanker to reach Cuba for first time in three months
item.description: A Russian oil tanker has been spotted just off the coast of the island.

item.title: Magda Szubanski’s new memoir Can’t Tell You But I Will set for release following battle with rare cancer
item.description: The comedian announced she was in remission in February.

item.title: Adelaide 36ers lodge formal complaint with NBL against Andrew Bogut after bitter title fight turns ‘personal’
item.description: The fiery NBL grand final series has taken another twist with officials lodging a formal complaint over the rival coach’s behaviour.

item.title: Morning Show host Larry Emdur sends strong warning after falling victim to AI-powered scam
item.description: ‘They’re liars and thieves.’

item.title: Fuel excise cut by Australian Government as petrol and diesel prices surge amid fuel crisis
item.description: Cheaper fuel is coming for at least three months after the government announced a national energy security plan to deal with the fuel crisis.

item.title: Kane Cornes accuses Zach Merrett of ‘giving up’ against North Melbourne
item.description: ‘I never thought I would see the day where that proud player would do this.’

item.title: Australia’s overseas fuel dependence sparks debate about making our petrol at home
item.description: The global oil crisis has kicked off calls for Australia to make our own, homegrown fuel. Experts say it’s not that simple.

item.title: eSafety Commissioner Julie Inman-Grant releases report accusing social media giants of dodging under-16s ban
item.description: Facebook, Instagram and TikTok are among the platforms facing fines of almost $50 million.

item.title: Angelina Jolie sparks concern during Tom Ford event at Shanghai Fashion Week
item.description: While many praised her simple yet stylish look, some expressed concern about her health.

item.title: Australian Olympic swimmer Emily Seebohm asks mums on TikTok for help after ‘struggling’ with son’s sleep
item.description: The mum-of-one has asked other people for advice.

item.title: Israel passes controversial new death penalty bill targeting Palestinians
item.description: Australia joined France, Germany, Italy and the UK in voicing ‘deep concern’ for the bill.

item.title: Remote communities cut off as flights are axed despite soaring demand, Australian Competition and Consumer Commission finds
item.description: With two airlines dominating most routes, the country’s most isolated communities are left with few options.

item.title: Middle East conflict: Cut to Australia’s fuel excise is smart politics but a poor answer to fixing the root problem
item.description: The decision is part of the government’s plan to secure the country’s oil supply.

item.title: Grammy award winner Celine Dion set to return to the stage after sad diagnosis of stiff-person syndrome
item.description: ‘Over the last few years, every day that’s gone by, I’ve felt your prayers and support.’

item.title: Australia rallies around former Home and Away actress Alea O’Shea amid brain cancer battle
item.description: Those close to the young Aussie woman have provided an update as she fights brain cancer.

item.title: Cricket Australia set to make shock contract calls as Todd Murphy returns while Jhye Richardson dumped
item.description: Cricket Australia are set to make a brutal call over a fringe Test paceman despite making his long-awaited return to the Australian team over the summer.

item.title: David Koch’s key tips to survive financial crisis as global markets tumble amid Middle East conflict
item.description: Here's what you need to know before making any rash decisions.

item.title: Michael Voss and Stephen Silvagni named as Kane Cornes unveils Carlton ‘wheel of blame’
item.description: Kane Cornes has spared no one when revealing who is at fault for the club’s dire situation.

item.title: Middle East war: Fuel excise cut begins but price relief may take days
item.description: Motorists are urged to be patient while the reduction kicks in.

item.title: King Charles III will undertake state visit to the United States in late April
item.description: Charles has visited the US 19 times, but it will be his first state visit to the country.

item.title: The most common painting mistake, according to the Three Birds Renovations team
item.description: Including the wall you're probably forgetting to paint.

item.title: US-Iran war live updates: Victoria announces free public transport throughout April amid ongoing fuel crisis
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Under-fire England opener Ben Duckett convicted of speeding in latest setback since drunken Ashes episode
item.description: The 31-year-old pleaded guilty just days after dropping a $400,000 contract.

item.title: Intercepted call and car travelling from Porepunkah helped police find Dezi Freeman before fatal stand-off
item.description: A tip-off from a member of the public appears to have led police straight to where the fugitive was hiding.

item.title: Ricky Ponting’s call pays off as Aussie young gun Cooper Connolly makes extraordinary IPL debut
item.description: The legend ‘went to the IPL auction with one player in mind’ and now that youngster is ‘the talk of the world’.

item.title: Tiger Woods announces he is ‘stepping away to seek treatment’ after pleading not guilty to driving under the influence
item.description: The troubled golf superstar has made a ‘necessary’ decision after entering a plea in court over his car crash.

item.title: Consumers may still cop the cost of scrapped card surcharges if RBA doesn’t tackle bank fees for small businesses
item.description: A six-month gap between surcharge scrapping and boosted bank transparency could leave businesses in a bind.

item.title: Three people have been charged after a man was shot at 12 times outside a gym in Gregory Hills
item.description: Police allege two men fired at the victim before escaping in a getaway vehicle.

item.title: Prime Minister’s Address to the Nation: Anthony Albanese calls on Aussies to reserve fuel, catch public transport amid war
item.description: ‘We will deal with these global challenges, the Australian way. Working together — and looking after each other.’

item.title: Police seize $320,000 in allegedly stolen Lego from Adelaide home
item.description: A 34‑year‑old woman and a 42‑year‑old man have been charged with theft.

item.title: Sam Konstas among five Aussies axed as Jake Weatherald promoted in contract shake-up
item.description: The 20-year-old has been dumped after a lean summer that saw him left out of the Ashes team.

item.title: Hugh Jackman and Deborra-Lee Furness relist penthouse with $14m price cut
item.description: The property now has the revised price guide of $43.3 million.

item.title: Wildlife warrior Bindi Irwin details years-long battle with endometriosis to raise awareness: ‘Don’t give up on yourself’
item.description: ‘If you’re in pain, my heart breaks for you. I believe you.’

item.title: How a new alert sparked an off-duty nurse’s dash to save a NSW driver in cardiac arrest - but anyone can be a hero
item.description: ‘I’ve been given my life back and I’ll now be there to walk my daughter down the aisle.’

item.title: Epic scenes as former Socceroos boss Graham Arnold leads Iraq to World Cup qualification
item.description: The veteran becomes the first Aussie coach in history to lead two different nations to a World Cup.

item.title: Hundreds of jobs at risk as Queensland seafood company Raptis collapses hours before Easter rush
item.description: Last-ditch efforts to save the company have fallen short.

item.title: WATCH LIVE: Anthony Albanese’s Address to the Nation amid Middle East war
item.description: Anthony Albanese is calling on Australians to conserve fuel as the war rages on.

item.title: Border collie reunited with owner Jessica Johnston after falling down New Zealand waterfall
item.description: The bedraggled and hungry pup spent a week surviving in the dense bushland.

item.title: Uber courier hands back $50k in film equipment after it went missing during delivery
item.description: Just hours after 7NEWS helped the business owner bring attention to the issue, the driver came forward ending a week‑long mystery.

item.title: Middle East conflict: US strongly considering NATO exit, US President Donald Trump says
item.description: ‘I always knew they were a paper tiger.’

item.title: Middle East conflict response: Prime Minister to announce $1 billion in interest-free business loans
item.description: ‘This is just another way we are acting to get ahead of issues.’

item.title: Middle East conflict: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese’s Address to the Nation lacked a ‘clear plan’
item.description: ‘What was the point of that?’

item.title: Unfiltered: Master coach Alastair Clarkson opens up on stress of AFL industry, and why he pushes on
item.description: The master coach has explained how he quickly put things in perspective during an ‘unbelievable’ storm.

item.title: Easter long weekend and Good Friday 2026 trading hours: When Coles, Woolworths, Aldi, IGA, Liquorland, BWS and Dan Murphy’s stores are open
item.description: Many stores are closed or have restricted hours over the long weekend - here’s everything you need to know.

item.title: Middle East war: US President Donald Trump claims Iran has asked for a ceasefire, calls for Strait of Hormuz to open
item.description: ‘We will consider when Hormuz Strait is open, free, and clear.’

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Iran vows ‘more destructive’ escalation after Trump’s speech
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Ex-Fleetwood Mac member Lindsey Buckingham doused with unknown substance in attack
item.description: The music legend was ambushed at an appointment.

item.title: Premiership coach Adam Simpson not completely ruling out Carlton job as pressure builds on Michael Voss
item.description: ‘Clearly this is playing around in Michael Voss’s head.’

item.title: Fears for Delouise Hoeter’s NRL career after Broncos veteran suffers crushing injury blow
item.description: The 32-year-old is facing a huge test of resilience amid serious fears for his career.

item.title: Matildas superstar Mary Fowler signs insane $10m deal with iconic brand
item.description: ‘The big brands weren’t just trying to sign a footballer, they were after a cultural icon.’

item.title: NASA successfully launches first lunar voyage in decades
item.description: Four astronauts are aboard the Artemis II.

item.title: Three-vehicle crash involving cattle truck kills young driver and 35 cows in Walcha, NSW
item.description: Some of the livestock were euthanised due to their injuries.

item.title: Coastal vs. Bush: Three Brisbane homes that feel like a holiday, but are closer than you think
item.description: Brisbane Twenty Five Minute Sanctuaries emerge for luxury

item.title: More heartbreak for Sam Kerr after Chelsea’s controversial Champions League loss to Arsenal
item.description: The Aussie was shattered as potentially her final chance at European glory was ended in controversial circumstances.

item.title: Indonesia issues alert with ‘possible hazardous tsunami waves’ after huge magnitude 7.4 earthquake
item.description: Fears of a destructive ocean surge have triggered alerts for communities within 1000km of the epicentre.

item.title: Melbourne Storm star Tui Kamikamica discharged from hospital after suffering a suspected stroke
item.description: The 31-year-old will now begin the next stage of his recovery.

item.title: 2027 Hyundai Staria, Staria Load prices: Hybrid joins van and MPV ranges, EV on the way
item.description: Hybrid and electric powertrains join a revamped Hyundai Staria lineup with revised styling, more kit, and diesel power remaining – for now.

item.title: 2027 Subaru Forester Wilderness Hybrid revealed as brand’s most rugged hybrid yet
item.description: Subaru has more efficient hybrids and more rugged Wilderness editions, and now it has combined the two with the latest Forester.

item.title: Hyundai ute previewed by rugged Boulder Concept
item.description: With a ladder frame, 37-inch all-terrain tyres and a boxy body, the Boulder Concept previews the brand’s upcoming pickup.

item.title: The moment Australia’s most notorious fugitive Dezi Freeman was found and killed in Victoria
item.description: March 30 started like any other day on mat leave for me. But as I got ready for a gym class, I was hit with an influx of messages saying: ‘Dezi Freeman dead!’

item.title: Embattled Essendon coach Brad Scott shuts down talk about rebuilding: ‘Hard work’s done’
item.description: The footy world is saying he has to do it but Brad Scott has fired back with a message of his own.

item.title: AFL great Garry Lyon in hot mic drama as ‘disrespectful’ comment about Tanya Plibersek gets out
item.description: The experienced commentator has apologised after the off-air footage was inadvertently streamed.

item.title: THE NEW YORK TIMES: US President Donald Trump has discussed firing his Attorney-General Pam Bondi
item.description: President Donald Trump has discussed firing his Attorney-General Pam Bondi in recent days as he grows frustrated with her leadership.

item.title: 'High rents, lower property value': where investors are eyeing in regional Australia
item.description: Finding the right location can really pay off.

item.title: Scare for Adelaide as key forwards Riley Thilthorpe and Darcy Fogarty fail to complete match-eve session
item.description: The big forwards have both failed to complete the important session a day out from the Good Friday blockbuster.

item.title: Woman hit by bus and killed ‘retrieving personal item’ in Adelaide CBD
item.description: The 39-year-old was hit by a bus and could not be revived.

item.title: Supercars CEO James Warburton suddenly quits two rounds into the season
item.description: The shock departure comes less than 12 months after he returned to the role for a second stint.

item.title: Albanese's $19 fuel win being swallowed by a $700 mortgage hit
item.description: Three ways to use fuel savings to fight future rate rises now

item.title: 2027 Subaru Getaway revealed: There can be only two Toyota Highlander EVs
item.description: Subaru has revealed its fourth-ever EV. Enter the Getaway, a three-row SUV with nearly 500km of driving range and blistering performance.

item.title: BMW claims 2026 World Car of the Year, Hyundai and Mazda also recognised
item.description: The BMW iX3 is this year’s WCOTY, while the Hyundai Ioniq 6 N claimed the performance car gong and the Mazda 6e claimed the design award.

item.title: Calls for help heard before hiker found dead on notorious Mount Tibrogargan in Queensland
item.description: The mountain is considered one of the Sunshine Coast’s most treacherous.

item.title: Prime minister Anthony Albanese announces crackdown on gambling in bid to reduce exposure to harms
item.description: ‘What we don’t want is kids growing up thinking that footy and gambling are the same thing.’

item.title: Fuel prices cut again in Australia after GST deal
item.description: Motorists will pay 5.7 cents less per litre after Australia’s states and territories agree to pool GST revenue to fund the reduction.

item.title: Matt Rizzo’s hilarious three-word reaction to Aussie Olympic sprinter Bree Rizzo’s baby reveal
item.description: The Aussie star went public with her ‘little secret’ ahead of a special one-year anniversary appearance on Channel 7.

item.title: Accused Bondi shooter Naveed Akram’s fearful family lose court bid for suppression orders over names and addresses
item.description: ‘This case has unprecedented public interest, outrage, anger and grief.’

item.title: Major trial aims to detect Alzheimer’s earlier using online tests and blood screening
item.description: ‘We believe this has the potential to reduce the number of people developing dementia in the long run.’

item.title: Rare outbreak of nasty respiratory infection diphtheria prompts vaccination calls for kids
item.description: The disease was a common cause of death among kids until the 1940s.

item.title: Matildas issue explosive statement on Asian Cup prize money after request to work with AFC ‘ignored’
item.description: Players have been quietly seething for months and refused to stay silent any longer.

item.title: Sam Kerr’s reported move to NWSL upstart Denver Summit FC revealed hours after Chelsea’s Champions League exit
item.description: The Matildas captain is leaving England for a new start with a high-profile club.

item.title: Shocked Pies ‘caught off guard’ as Nick Daicos dramatically ruled out of Brisbane blockbuster
item.description: The superstar ‘just looked terrible’ and the decision was finally made for him moments before the bounce.

item.title: Why Lego theft is booming: Expert explains the soaring resale market
item.description: Hundreds of thousands of dollars’ worth of sets were seized from an Adelaide home.

item.title: Woman rescued from Perth’s Swan River after police dive in to save her
item.description: Two officers have been praised for their bravery after diving into the shark infested waters.

item.title: DNA testing confirms Ted Bundy killed Utah teen Lauran Ann Aime in 1974 cold case
item.description: After more than 50 years, an unsolved murder of a Utah teenager has been linked to the serial killer.

item.title: Man in his 50s dies after allegedly found with multiple wounds in Sydney’s Emu Plains
item.description: Police have arrested a 31‑year‑old at the scene as investigation continues.

item.title: Magnificent Manly give Foran dream coaching debut
item.description: After a week of turmoil Manly have stunned the dire Dolphins 52-18 in a brilliant display to give Kieran Foran a coaching debut that dreams are made of.

item.title: Trbojevic trio inspire extraordinary Manly in Kieran Foran’s coaching debut
item.description: The ‘new coach bounce’ produced an equal-record win to give the Sea Eagles some hope yet in 2026.

item.title: Star recruit Oscar Allen kicks three goals as banged-up Brisbane Lions thrash Collingwood
item.description: The defending premiers belted the Pies as two pick-ups played their best games since joining the club.

item.title: Australia faces ‘sharp recession’ if US escalates Middle East war
item.description: If the US President Donald Trump continues the war, Australians may see a bigger financial crisis.
